sub_mechanisms: M_1: compute curl-free component of gradient field via Helmholtz projection
M_3: update parameters with curl-free part only
M_4: log divergence-free magnitude as diagnostic
stripped_llm_application: At each training step, project the per-step gradient onto the orthogonal direct sum of curl-free and divergence-free components; apply only the curl-free part to parameter updates; record the divergence-free part as a diagnostic.
novelty_claim_stripped: Null-LoRA / NP-LoRA / CLoRA project updates onto null space of pretrained weights (parameter-space null space); SUMO orthogonalizes singular values. This candidate uses GRADIENT-FIELD Helmholtz decomposition: orthogonal split of the GRADIENT VECTOR FIELD, not the parameter space.
